content: Hand-rolled Python FSM pattern (web search unavailable, training-knowledge fallback): Enum for states, dict[State, set[State]] or dict[State, list[State]] for legal transitions, a transition_to()/can_transition() method validating against the dict before mutating. Matches project's own ARCHITECTURE.md Pattern 2 already documented from Phase-level research -- no new information beyond what's already in .planning/research/ARCHITECTURE.md.
